positioning: Big 4 / strategy consulting style with modern product polish
principles: Use strong bands, cards, and sectional hierarchy
Keep pages scannable with concise lead copy and structured subsections
Favor neutral backgrounds, dark headers, and selective accent color

components.name: HeroBand
components.purpose: Primary page header with executive headline, summary, and optional CTA block

components.name: SectionAnchorNav
components.purpose: Sticky or inline navigation for long pages with anchor links to sections

components.name: ExecutiveCardGrid
components.purpose: Grid of concise cards for pillars, phases, offerings, or use cases

components.name: SignalCallout
components.purpose: Dark or accent callout for North Star, key principle, or differentiation

components.name: DiagramBand
components.purpose: Container for visual model sections with labels and supporting notes
